# Copilot Instructions

This folder contains always-on and file-scoped instructions for GitHub Copilot Chat.

- `development-workflow.instructions.md`: Startup and required reading order for all tasks.
- `project-rules.instructions.md`: Java/Spring coding rules distilled from project docs.

Notes:
- Keep instruction files short and stable.
- Put reusable, task-heavy workflows in `.github/skills`.
- Put slash command entrypoints in `.github/prompts`.
